turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, uh, I want to schedule a diabetes check-up. My sugar levels have been off lately.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand. We have an endocrinology and diabetology department. May I have your name please?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Krishnamurti Rao. People usually call me Krish.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure, Krish! And your phone number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great. Dr. Pallavi Nambiar specialises in diabetology. She's available this Friday at 10 AM or next Monday at 2 PM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hmm, Friday... actually, can I come Monday? 2 PM is better for me work-wise.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course. Monday at 2 PM with Dr. Pallavi Nambiar — all booked for you. Anything else you need?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Do I need to fast before the appointment?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For a general diabetology consultation you don't necessarily need to fast, but it's a good idea to have a light meal and avoid sweets beforehand. The doctor will advise further during the visit.
